title: [No Spoilers!] Let's Play the Old Ones' Demo [Cthulhu]
overview: Struggling streamer Miko Kurono joins the new VR game "KADATH" to change her fate, after a wave of mysterious incidents where popular streamers collapse during livestreams. She soon discovers the game is a deadly trap by the gods and must survive the unfolding cosmic horror.

title: [SAN Check] Small Streamers Collab! [Great Old Ones]
overview: The first game against the Great Old Ones begins.

title: [PvE] Just Another Day at the Old Ones' Academy [Shoggoth]
overview: Eita adds a new rule to the game.

title: [Puzzle Game] Welcome to Hotel Reversal [Escape Room]
overview: The Great Old Ones' next game is an escape room.

title: [Up and Down] Is Humanity Quiz a Kusoge? [Stole 1 Mil]
overview: The streamers attend the third game of the Cosmic Horror Show, this time hosted by Ghatanothoa.

title: [Foodie] Summoned for a Day With the Old Ones [Ancient City]
overview: The Great Old Ones manifest in the real world for a day of fun.

title: [Old Awakening] Kyoto Tower Defense [Cthugha]
overview: The battle to defend Kyoto from the Great Old Ones' armies begins.

title: [Putting Out Fires] Miko and Kanna's TV Shot! [Top Cultist]
overview: Humanity begins to go mad as the last game approaches.

title: [Finals] Crying Out Family in the Mountains of Madness [Hastur]
overview: The last game begins at the Mountains of Madness.

title: [Raising Sim] I Made Me, and It's Got My Heart Thumping [Ghatanothoa]
overview: Ghatanothoa makes a special game for Kanna to play.

title: [R'lyeh] Return from the Unlighted Chambers [Cthulhu]
overview: In the final phase, Miko has to overcome a lot of obstacles if she wants to reach Cthulhu.
